description: Style Notedkny Men II EDT, a woody-aromatic fragrance, is combination of spirit and soul, sophistication and speed. A highly modern fragrance which introduces an energetic composition, big contrasts and secrets.Product DetailsThe notes are white pepper, cardamom, violet leaves and moist jasmine, while a base adds sandalwood, cedar, patchouli, iris root and vetiverCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize50 ml
